Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x79E0 "TURNIT-79E0" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Turn It.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Removed the call to the kernal save routine ($FFD8) at $16EC to remove disk access from the game (for high score saving).
To skip the useless startup screen (copy protection?), the JMP $7680 instruction at $755C was changed to JMP $76DC instead.
